# MinAI

> AI-Powered Marketing Automation for Small Businesses & Contractors

MinAI is a SaaS platform that replaces fragmented software tools (CRM, email, SMS, reputation management, booking, etc.) with a unified AI-powered marketing automation system built specifically for small businesses and contractors.

## Website

- Homepage: https://minai.biz
- Products: https://minai.biz/products
- Pricing: https://minai.biz/pricing
- Testimonials: https://minai.biz/testimonials
- Our Works: https://minai.biz/works
- About Us: https://minai.biz/about

## Products

### Talking Website
Get a lead-generating website in just days. SEO optimized, mobile friendly, with instant SMS chat widget.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/functional-website

### All In One Inbox
Every conversation in one place — SMS, Email, Google Business, and social DMs in a unified dashboard.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/all-in-one-inbox

### 5-Star Magic Review Funnel
Dominate local search results with automated review requests and smart filtering.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/magic-review-funnel

### Missed Call Text Back
Instantly capture every missed opportunity with automatic SMS replies.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/missed-call-text-back

### Business Phone
Professional dedicated business phone number with call tracking and privacy.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/business-phone

### Marketing Campaigns
Turn old leads into new profit with lead revival, review injection, and holiday promos.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/one-click-marketing

### Local SEO
Be the #1 choice in your city with on-site, off-site, and technical SEO optimization.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/local-seo

### SMS Lead Follow-Up
Automated text sequences that close deals — instant responses, drip campaigns, and smart logic.
URL: https://minai.biz/products/sms-lead-followup
